free_text: Elastic Scattering of Protons by Single Isotopes
elastic scattering of 22.2-MeV protons were measured
for 20 targets of predominantly single isotopic
composition at ~2.5-degree intervals over the angular
range of 20-150 degrees. For some of the data, the
proton beam passed through aluminum absorbers before
being collimated at the entrance of the scattering
chamber. This provided a beam of incident protons of
The data obtained from numerical integration of the
elastic peaks were corrected for center-of-mass
motion, etc., before angular distributions and cross
